adversarialCases.scenario: provider-studio accidentally enabled by committed linux-features/features.json

criteriaCoverage.originalIntent: User asked to execute the first real project improvement wave for Codex Provider Studio under ulw-loop discipline.
criteriaCoverage.desiredOutcome: Wave 1 foundations exist without product behavior: Rust crate scaffold, disabled Linux feature scaffold, and test-only mock-provider fixtures.
criteriaCoverage.userOutcomeReview: All C001-C003 criteria passed, review lanes passed, no features.json or real provider calls were introduced, and the work remains uncommitted pending user approval.
